g.text: I read & edit files and run commands; you
approve anything that touches your code.
fix the failing test in tests/
add an anthropic provider to my config
audit the app: performance in both themes, and find unused CSS
I'll run this in parallel ‚ÄĒ the
agent audits both themes while an
agent sweeps for unused CSS variables.
